content.json:
# AI Gateway Dashboard — Azure API Management + Microsoft Foundry

End-to-end view of every AI call traversing the gateway: **token consumption**, **cost**, **latency**, **errors & throttling**, **semantic cache**, **load balancing**, **content safety**, **agent/tool & MCP calls**, and a **live trace explorer**.

> Tip: paste the **Test Run ID** printed by `clients/run_all.py` into the parameter below to isolate a single live demo run.

parameters.name: Product
parameters.label: Product
parameters.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| extend Product = tostring(customDimensions['Product'])
| where isnotempty(Product)
| distinct Product

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
customMetrics
| where name in ('Total Tokens','Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens')
| extend Product = tostring(customDimensions['Product']), TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Test Run ID']), UserId = tostring(customDimensions['User ID'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| where ('{Product}' == '*' or Product == '{Product}')
| where ('{UserId}' == '' or UserId == '{UserId}')
| summarize Tokens = sum(valueSum) by name
| project Metric = name, Tokens
content.title: Token totals

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
let reqs = requests
| extend TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-test-run-id'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter);
reqs
| summarize Total = count(), Errors = countif(success == false), Throttled = countif(resultCode == 429), Blocked = countif(resultCode == 403), P95Latency = percentile(duration, 95)
| extend ErrPct = iff(Total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * Errors / Total, 1))
| project ['Total requests'] = todouble(Total), ['Error %'] = ErrPct, ['Throttled (429)'] = todouble(Throttled), ['Blocked (403)'] = todouble(Blocked), ['P95 latency (ms)'] = round(P95Latency, 0)
| evaluate narrow()
content.title: Request health
Estimated cost

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| extend Product = tostring(customDimensions['Product']), TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Test Run ID']), UserId = tostring(customDimensions['User ID'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| where ('{Product}' == '*' or Product == '{Product}')
| where ('{UserId}' == '' or UserId == '{UserId}')
| summarize Tokens = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, 1m), Product
| render areachart
content.title: Total tokens over time, by product

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
customMetrics
| where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens','Completion Reasoning Tokens')
| extend TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Test Run ID'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| summarize Tokens = sum(valueSum) by name
| render piechart
content.title: Token mix (prompt / completion / cached / reasoning)

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| extend Sub = tostring(customDimensions['Subscription ID']), Product = tostring(customDimensions['Product'])
| extend TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Test Run ID'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| summarize Tokens = sum(valueSum) by Product, Sub
| order by Tokens desc
content.title: Tokens by product and subscription

content.json:
## 3 · Cost view
Cost = (prompt tokens / 1000 × price-in) + (completion tokens / 1000 × price-out). Adjust the price parameters at the top.

content.title: Estimated cost by product (chargeback)

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
requests
| extend TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-test-run-id'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| summarize P50 = percentile(duration, 50), P95 = percentile(duration, 95), P99 = percentile(duration, 99) by bin(timestamp, 1m), operation_Name
| render timechart
content.title: Latency percentiles by operation (ms)

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
requests
| extend TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-test-run-id'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(timestamp, 1m), resultCode
| render columnchart
content.title: Request throughput by result code

content.json:
## 5 · Errors & throttling
429 = token rate limit exceeded · 403 = daily quota exceeded or content blocked.

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
requests
| extend TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-test-run-id'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| where resultCode in ('429','403') or toint(resultCode) >= 500
| summarize Count = count() by resultCode, operation_Name
| order by Count desc
content.title: Throttling, quota and server errors

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
requests
| extend RunId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-test-run-id']), Cache = tostring(customDimensions['Cache'])
| where (runFilter == '' or RunId == runFilter)
| where operation_Name has 'chat'
| where Cache in ('Hit','Miss')
| extend Outcome = iff(Cache == 'Hit', 'Served from cache', 'Forwarded to model')
| summarize Count = count() by Outcome
| render piechart
content.title: Cache hit ratio (per-request Cache outcome)

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
requests
| extend RunId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-test-run-id']), Cache = tostring(customDimensions['Cache'])
| where (runFilter == '' or RunId == runFilter)
| where operation_Name has 'chat'
| summarize Hits = countif(Cache == 'Hit'), Misses = countif(Cache == 'Miss'), NotCached = countif(Cache == 'None' or Cache == '')
| extend Lookups = Hits + Misses
| project ['Cache hits'] = Hits, ['Cache misses'] = Misses, ['Cache lookups'] = Lookups, ['Hit ratio %'] = iff(Lookups == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * Hits / Lookups, 1)), ['Not cached (throttled/blocked)'] = NotCached
content.title: Cache effectiveness (hit / miss / ratio)

content.query:
dependencies
| where target contains 'openai'
| summarize Calls = count(), Failures = countif(success == false), AvgMs = round(avg(duration),0) by target
| order by Calls desc
content.title: Backend selection & health (by host) — all model traffic in range

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
requests
| extend TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-test-run-id'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| where operation_Name has 'chat'
| extend Outcome = case(resultCode == '403', 'Blocked', resultCode == '200', 'Allowed', 'Other')
| summarize Count = count() by Outcome
| render piechart
content.title: Allowed vs blocked (content safety + quota)

content.json:
## 9 · Backend operations brokered by the gateway
Every model, embeddings and content-safety call the gateway forwards to a backend. Agent tool / MCP calls also appear here **when agent traffic is routed through the gateway** (the agent itself runs in Foundry, so by default its tool calls are recorded in Foundry, not here).

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
dependencies
| where target contains 'openai' or target contains 'cognitiveservices'
| summarize Calls = count(), Failures = countif(success == false), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 0), P95Ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 0) by Operation = name, Backend = target
| order by Calls desc
| take 100
content.title: Backend operations (models, embeddings, content safety)

content.json:
## 10 · Live trace explorer
Last 100 calls through the gateway. Click a row, then **End-to-end transaction details** to trace it across APIM → Foundry.

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
requests
| extend TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-test-run-id']), Product = tostring(customDimensions['Product Name']), UserId = tostring(customDimensions['Request-x-user-id'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| project timestamp, operation_Name, resultCode, durationMs = round(duration,0), Product, UserId, TestRunId, operation_Id
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent gateway requests

content.query:
let runFilter = '{TestRunId}';
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| extend Sub = tostring(customDimensions['Subscription ID']), Product = tostring(customDimensions['Product']), TestRunId = tostring(customDimensions['Test Run ID'])
| where (runFilter == '' or TestRunId == runFilter)
| summarize Tokens = sum(valueSum) by Product, Sub
| extend Recommendation = case(Tokens > 50000, 'High usage — consider PTU / reserved capacity', Tokens > 10000, 'Monitor — approaching quota', 'Healthy')
| order by Tokens desc
content.title: Usage hotspots & recommendations
